fileTabs.content: select /*+ parallel(r1) parallel(mc1) parallel(mc5) use_hash(r1 mc1 mc5) */ 	mc1.accid, case 	when 	mc1.status in ('8','9','Z','F','P','R','T','X') 	then 'Attrition' 	when 	mc1.delq_120_days +  	mc1.delq_150_days +  	mc1.delq_180_days +  	mc1.delq_210_days +  	mc1.delq_30_days +  	mc1.delq_60_days +  	mc1.delq_90_days > 0 	or 	mc1.fraud_type is not null 	then 'Delinquent' 	when 	r1.accid is null 	then 'New' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	r1.curr_total_int <= 0 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total < 0 	then 	'Inactive Credit Balance' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	r1.curr_total_int <= 0 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total >= 0 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total <= 1 	then 'Dormant' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	r1.curr_total_int <= 0 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 	then '0% Offer Paying Down' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	r1.curr_total_int > 0 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 	then 'Paying Down' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits < r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.prev_statement_balance_total > 1 	and 	r1.curr_total_int <= 0 	then 'External 0% Offer' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits < r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.prev_statement_balance_total > 1 	and 	r1.curr_total_int > 0 	then 'External Revolver' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits >= r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total <= 1 	then 'External Full Payer' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits >= r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 	then 'External Full Payer (Current)' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_inside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits < r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 	and 	r1.curr_total_int <= 0 	then 'MandS 0% Offer (Not Used)' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_inside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits < r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 	and 	r1.curr_total_int > 0 	then 'MandS Revolver' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_inside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits >= r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total <= 1 	then 'MandS Full Payer' 	when 	nvl(mc5.scheme_active, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_outside_3_months, 'N') = 'N' 	and 	nvl(mc5.usage_inside_3_months, 'N') = 'Y' 	and 	r1.curr_val_credits >= r1.prev_statement_balance_total 	and 	r1.curr_statement_balance_total >= 1	 	then 'MandS Full Payer (Current)' 	else 'Unknown' end 	segment from rep_cc_statement_mart_calc r1, account mc1, mrt_ccard_trans_derivations mc5 where	mc1.accid = r1.accid(+) and	mc1.accid = mc5.accid(+) and    mc1.acc_type in ('410','420','510','520')
